chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Requires Full Blood Money and Half Blood Money in Cases Other Than the Taking of a Life

text: 5293 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادٌ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ رَجُلٍ تَزَوَّجَ جَارِيَةً فَوَقَعَ عَلَيْهَا فَأَفْضَاهَا قَالَ "عَلَيْهِ اَلْإِجْرَاءُ عَلَيْهَا مَا دَامَتْ حَيَّةً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5293 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who married a slave girl, then had intercourse with her and caused ifda' (a severe injury of female reproductive organs).
Imam (as) replied: "He is responsible for providing for her needs as long as she is alive."
